def test_process_batch_skips_last_item():
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    processed = process_batch(items)
    assert len(processed) == len(items), "The processed list should have the same length as the input list."
    assert processed == [item * 2 for item in items], "The last item in the processed list should be twice the last item in the input list."

import pytest
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_all_items():
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    processed = process_batch(items)
    assert len(processed) == len(items), (
        f"Expected processed list to have the same length as input list, "
        f"but got {len(processed)} instead of {len(items)}."
    )
